creator: matt@matthoran.com
text:
Seems fine. I see that flag was introduced in Go 1.18. Do we need to do anything for backwards compatibility or is it presumed the user will have the latest Go when compiling ports?

I'd imagine this also needs to be done widely across Go programs. If this build flag can be inherited by this port then that would be preferable.

Do you need me to make a patch for this or would you apply one?
